.status-bar.background: rgb(29, 37, 47) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, hsla(215, 22%, 13%, 1) 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(hsla(215, 22%, 13%, 1), color-mix(in srgb, hsla(215, 22%, 13%, 1) 65%, transparent))
body.--raised-background: color-mix(in srgb, hsla(215, 22%, 13%, 1) 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(hsla(215, 22%, 13%, 1), color-mix(in srgb, hsla(215, 22%, 13%, 1) 65%, transparent))
body.--xfa-unfocused-field-background: url("data:image/svg+xmlcharset=UTF-8,<svg width='1px' height='1px' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><rect width='100%' height='100%' style='fill:rgba(0, 54, 255, 0.13)'/></svg>")
body.background: rgb(29, 37, 47) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body::before.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, hsla(215, 22%, 13%, 1) 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(hsla(215, 22%, 13%, 1), color-mix(in srgb, hsla(215, 22%, 13%, 1) 65%, transparent))

body::before.--font-monospace: '??', '??', ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, "Cascadia Mono", "Roboto Mono", "DejaVu Sans Mono", "Liberation Mono", Menlo, Monaco, "Consolas", "Source Code Pro", monospace
body::before.--font-monospace-default: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, "Cascadia Mono", "Roboto Mono", "DejaVu Sans Mono", "Liberation Mono", Menlo, Monaco, "Consolas", "Source Code Pro", monospace
body::before.--font-text: '??', '??', ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", "Inter", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif
body::before.--metadata-input-font: '??', '??', '??', ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", "Inter", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

body::before.--raised-background: color-mix(in srgb, hsla(215, 22%, 13%, 1) 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(hsla(215, 22%, 13%, 1), color-mix(in srgb, hsla(215, 22%, 13%, 1) 65%, transparent))
body::before.--raised-mask: linear-gradient(white, white) padding-box, linear-gradient(white, white) border-box
